name: rote-setup
description: Guided, interactive first-run setup for rote.

interface.shortDescription: Guided first-run setup for rote — install, sign in, add adapters, prove it works.
interface.longDescription: A conversational onboarding wizard for rote. Installs the binary, signs you in (identity-gated), then forks: stop at just the CLI, pull curated powerpack adapters, or build adapters from the 872-API built-in catalog. Wires credentials, connects OAuth, installs the rote agent skill, and ends by running one live flow against your own data. Every branch is a clear choice — it never runs the whole setup silently.
